title: Central University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Central University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Central University Result 2026 Out for 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester MA Sociology, MSc Environmental Sciences, Biochemistry, Chemistry, Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc. Chemistry, MTTM and Biotechnology courses on the official website - cuh.ac.in on 07-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the CUHP result.

content.text: Central University has officially released the CUHP 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester Result 2026 for multiple PG and integrated programmes for the latest examination cycle. The released results include Master of Arts (Sociology) NEP 1st Semester, Master of Science (Environmental Sciences) NEP 1st Semester, Master of Science (Biochemistry) NEP 1st Semester, Master of Science (Chemistry) NEP 1st Semester, Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc. (Chemistry) 5th Semester, Master of Science (Chemistry) 3rd Semester, Master of Tourism and Travel Management NEP 1st Semester, Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc. (Chemistry) 1st Semester, and Master of Science (Biotechnology) Re-appear 1st Semester.

CUHP Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - cuh.ac.in. Students can check and download their semester results by visiting the official result page and, where applicable, the Samarth portal linked by the university. The published results cover both regular and re-appear categories for 1st, 3rd and 5th semester examinations.

Students should carefully verify their name, roll number, course, semester, subject details and result status after downloading the marksheet or PDF result. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the university examination branch for correction through the official website.

The university has published the latest CUHP Result 2026 update for several arts, science and tourism programmes across 1st, 3rd and 5th semesters. Students from NEP, regular and re-appear streams can check their results online through the official result page and the Samarth student portal linked by the university.

rows: MA Sociology NEP, MSc Environmental Sciences NEP, MSc Biochemistry NEP, MSc Chemistry NEP, Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc. Chemistry, MSc Chemistry, MTTM NEP, MSc Biotechnology Re-appear

content.text: The university has activated the direct links to check the latest CUHP Result 2026 for 1st, 3rd and 5th semester MA, MSc, integrated chemistry and tourism programmes. Students can view or download their results instantly through the official portal using the result links provided below and, where required, access the Samarth portal for login-based result checking.

links.label: Master of Tourism & Travel Management_NEP - 1st Sem

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download the CUHP 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official result page of the university - https://www.cuh.ac.in/Result.aspx.
Look for the latest result notification dated 07-04-2026 for your course and semester.
Click on the relevant result entry such as MA Sociology NEP 1st Sem, MSc Chemistry 3rd Sem, or Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc. Chemistry 5th Sem.
If the result is published as a downloadable PDF, open it and search your roll number or name.
If the university redirects result access through the Samarth portal, open https://cuh.samarth.edu.in/ and log in using your student credentials.
Download or save the marksheet/result page for future reference.
Verify all details carefully and contact the examination branch in case of any discrepancy.

structured_links.label: Master of Tourism & Travel Management_NEP - 1st Sem
